info.title: Asaancar API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Asaancar - Car rental and pick & drop service platform

get.description: Get a list of active areas, optionally filtered by city
Get a paginated list of contact messages (admin only)

post.description: Submit a new contact message

message.example: I would like to inquire about...

get.description: Get statistics for contact messages (admin only)

post.description: Create or increment a contact stat when a user taps call, WhatsApp, or chat on a ride or ride request
Upload a single image to S3 storage

image.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, webp, max 2MB)

delete.description: Delete an image from S3 storage

post.description: Upload multiple images to S3 storage (max 10 images)

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user

parameters.name: unread_only
parameters.description: Filter to show only unread notifications

delete.description: Delete all notifications for the authenticated user

get.description: Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read
Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Get a paginated list of active pick and drop services with optional filters

post.description: Create a new pick and drop service

get.summary: Get pick and drop service details
get.description: Get detailed information about a specific pick and drop service

put.description: Update an existing pick and drop service (only owner can update)

delete.description: Delete a pick and drop service (only owner can delete)

get.summary: Get user's pick and drop services
get.description: Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's pick and drop services

get.summary: List favorite pick and drop services
get.description: Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's favorite pick and drop services

post.description: Add a specific pick and drop service to the user's favorites

delete.description: Remove a specific pick and drop service from the user's favorites

get.description: Get a paginated list of active ride requests with optional filters

parameters.name: start_latitude
parameters.description: Start latitude for nearest match search

parameters.name: start_longitude
parameters.description: Start longitude for nearest match search

parameters.name: end_latitude
parameters.description: End latitude for nearest match search

parameters.name: end_longitude
parameters.description: End longitude for nearest match search

post.description: Create a new ride request

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific ride request

put.description: Update an existing ride request (only owner can update)

delete.description: Delete a ride request (only owner can delete)

get.description: Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's ride requests
Get user statistics for admin dashboard

post.description: Authenticate user with email/phone and password
Destroy the authenticated session and revoke the access token
Confirm the user's password before sensitive operations
Reset user password using the reset token
Send OTP via SMS for login. If the phone number does not exist yet, a customer account will be created first.
Verify OTP and authenticate user
Send OTP via email or SMS for new user registration

is_existing_user.description: True if user already exists (will log in after OTP verification)

post.description: Verify OTP for new user registration. Must be called before /api/register

200.description: OTP verified successfully. If user exists, they are logged in immediately.

token.description: Authentication token (only if is_existing_user is true)

post.description: Set or update password for a user (optional, can be done after OTP login)
Send a password reset link to the user's email

200.description: Reset link sent if account exists

message.example: A reset link will be sent if the account exists.

post.description: Register a new user account. OTP must be verified first using /api/verify-signup-otp

422.description: Validation error or OTP not verified

get.description: Get a list of conversations for the authenticated user

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by conversation type (user, pick_and_drop, ride_request)

post.description: Create a new conversation for a user, pick and drop service, or ride request

user_id.description: Alias for recipient_user_id when type is ride_request

ride_request_id.description: Optional ride request reference if type is ride_request

get.description: Get all messages for a conversation and mark them as read

post.description: Send a message in a conversation

message.example: Hello, I'm interested in this service

delete.description: Delete a conversation for the current user only (soft delete). The conversation will remain visible to other participants. If the user sends a new message, the conversation will be restored but old messages will remain hidden.

get.description: Get a list of all cities

put.description: Update the authenticated user's password. Current password is required only if user has a password set.

current_password.description: Required only if user has a password

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

get.description: Get the VAPID public key for web push notification subscription

post.description: Store the push subscription for the authenticated user

ContactingStat.title: Contacting Stat
ContactingStat.description: Tracks contact actions taken on rides and ride requests

sanctum.description: Enter token in format (Bearer <token>). Get your token from /api/login or /api/register endpoints.

tags.description: API Endpoints for tracking contact actions

tags.description: API Endpoints for image upload and management

tags.name: Pick & Drop
tags.description: API Endpoints for pick and drop services

tags.name: OTP
tags.description: API Endpoints for OTP (One-Time Password) authentication

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: API Endpoints for chat and messaging

tags.name: WebPush
tags.description: API Endpoints for web push notifications
